做地盤仲好啦

My friend Jay is a professional gardener. In his front garden he planted a litchi tree, two mango trees and bushes in the lawn. Some of the bushes produce beautiful trombone-shaped flowers. She also grew flowers such as orchids, roses, violets, lavender, hydrangeas and sunflowers, most of which are in bloom. There're some exquisite flowerpots placed near the lawn as decoration. He mowed the grass every now and then. He manicure his garden from time to time. His back garden is enormous which is two thousand five hundred square foot in size. It used to be a lawn but he turned it into a meadow that is blanketed in wild flowers and exotic flowers. Some of the flower buds haven't opened yet but as the weather gets warmer the flowers open. Even inside his house he has a vase of hydrangea and a few potted plants, some of which are just coming into bloom. Orchids can be cultivated in flower pots or vases. In summer, summer flowers bloom in the meadow. In spring, the meadow is covered with pretty spring flowers. In the autumn the meadow is blanketed with lovely autumn flowers. In the winter the meadow is a mass of beautiful winter flowers. It's an extraordinary garden. He buys his girlfriend a bouquet of red roses, hydrangeas and sunflowers every valentine's day. They're pretty cut flowers. Some women seem to bloom in their mid-thirties. For example Tracy has bloomed into an utterly beautiful creature in her thirties. She's a iphone saleswoman who earns an hourly wage of ninety dollars plus a twenty six percent commission on every iphone she sells so her job isn't on commission only. So far this year her sales have fallen short of her expectation partly because the economy is hardly blooming. I enjoy strolling hand in hand with my girlfriend along the nearby beach. In fact I took a leisurely stroll there earlier. With only my thoughts for company I lay down on the beach reading a book. It was thoroughly enjoyable.
